heading: Study of coordination of Federal and State activities; report
label: 959 Study of coordination of Federal and State activities; report
notes: Amendments1977—Subsec. (a). inserted reference to mines other than coal mines.Pub. L. 95–164

Effective Date of 1977 AmendmentAmendment by effective 120 days after , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 95–164section 307 of Pub. L. 95–164section 801 of this titleNov. 9, 1977
amendments: Amendments1977—Subsec. (a). inserted reference to mines other than coal mines.Pub. L. 95–164

Effective Date of 1977 AmendmentAmendment by effective 120 days after , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 95–164section 307 of Pub. L. 95–164section 801 of this titleNov. 9, 1977

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary shall make a study to determine the best manner to coordinate Federal and State activities in the field of coal or other mine health and safety so as to achieve (1) maximum health and safety protection for miners, (2) an avoidance of duplication of effort, (3) maximum effectiveness, (4) a reduction of delay to a minimum, and (5) most effective use of Federal inspectors.

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary shall make a report of the results of his study to the Congress as soon as practicable after .December 30, 1969
